events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the missing kick-out flashing is a sequence violation — it must be installed before the upper-wall WRB laps over it and before cladding closes in the assembly. Decision is `fail` (high risk) since continuing to cover the junction risks concealed water damage; any WRB/cladding already installed over the spot needs to be opened and inspected before correction and closeout.
